creator: lev@serebryakov.spb.ru
text:
Could not build port. moc2 core dumped.
	Hardware is Ok (I used this computer to build about 0.5Gb of other
	ports and packages).
	It happens ALWAYS -- I could repeat this behiavoir in any time.
	qt-2.3.1 was compiled perfectly. I think, it is result of `objprelink'.

	Here is tail of build log (I could send full log upon request)
=========================
c++ -pthread -D_THREAD_SAFE -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT -c -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt23/work/qt-2.3.1/include -pthread -D_THREAD_SAFE -I/usr/X11R6/include -DQT_PREFIX=\"/usr/X11R6\" -pipe -fno-exceptions  -O -pipe -I/usr/include -D_PTH_H_ -D_PTH_PTHREAD_H_ -frerun-cse-after-loop -O2 -fPIC -DQT_BUILTIN_GIF_READER=1 -DQT_XFT -fno-exceptions  -I/usr/local/include  -o tools/qutfcodec.o tools/qutfcodec.cpp
c++ -pthread -D_THREAD_SAFE -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT -c -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt23/work/qt-2.3.1/include -pthread -D_THREAD_SAFE -I/usr/X11R6/include -DQT_PREFIX=\"/usr/X11R6\" -pipe -fno-exceptions  -O -pipe -I/usr/include -D_PTH_H_ -D_PTH_PTHREAD_H_ -frerun-cse-after-loop -O2 -fPIC -DQT_BUILTIN_GIF_READER=1 -DQT_XFT -fno-exceptions  -I/usr/local/include  -o kernel/qpsprinter.o kernel/qpsprinter.cpp
/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt23/work/qt-2.3.1/bin/moc2 kernel/qthread_unix.cpp -o kernel/qthread_unix.moc
gmake[2]: *** [kernel/qthread_unix.moc] Segmentation fault (core dumped)
gmake[2]: *** Deleting file `kernel/qthread_unix.moc'
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt23/work/qt-2.3.1/src'
gmake[1]: *** [src-mt] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt23/work/qt-2.3.1'
gmake: *** [src-mt] Error 2
*** Error code 2
=========================

   Here is backtrace for core file:
=========================
#0  0x0 in ?? ()
#1  0x805e912 in QGList::append ()
#2  0x805f5ae in QGListIterator::QGListIterator ()
#3  0x804e9a9 in nameQualifier ()
#4  0x804f663 in qualifiedClassName ()
#5  0x8052ec0 in generateClass ()
#6  0x8054a49 in yyparse ()
#7  0x804da88 in main ()
#8  0x80493e9 in _start ()
=========================

Fix: 

I don't know :(
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt23
	make
